text: Code reviews are an essential practice in software development. When developers review each other's code before it is merged, they help catch bugs early, saving time and effort later. This process also encourages knowledge sharing, as team members learn different approaches and coding styles. Over time, code reviews improve overall team quality by promoting best practices and ensuring consistency in the codebase. They create a collaborative environment where everyone contributes to building better software. Regular reviews build trust among team members and reduce the risk of future errors.
